# Third-Party Code

## embedded-cli

Source: <https://github.com/funbiscuit/embedded-cli.git>

Vendored commit:

```text
8e796cbf2263f055d43b6ad99b9ddc8feece4cfd
```

The firmware includes:

```text
third_party/embedded-cli/lib/include/embedded_cli.h
third_party/embedded-cli/lib/src/embedded_cli.c
```

The upstream license is preserved in
`third_party/embedded-cli/LICENSE.txt`.
